description_long: This is a modern two-story house set on a rectangular lot, surrounded by tall, evenly spaced coniferous trees along the perimeter. The house features a flat roof and a clean, geometric design with large windows on both floors, allowing for ample natural light. The front yard is landscaped with green lawns and a paved driveway leading to a garage on one side. The property is bordered by a sidewalk and a two-lane street, with additional trees lining the street edge. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard, also bordered by trees, providing privacy and greenery. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, with a focus on symmetry and open space.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story house with large windows, surrounded by tall trees and landscaped lawns, set on a rectangular lot with a driveway and garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and symmetrical tree-lined street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the lot, the garage, and the row of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, rear facade with large windows, and dense tree border.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's side elevation, driveway, and street with trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, paved steps, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaping and a driveway.
